name: Spicy Rice and Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter and honey in a pan.
2. Add the diced vegetables (green chilies, green bell pepper, celery, onion) to the pan and sauté until fragrant.
3. Stir in the brown rice and continue to sauté until the onions become translucent.
4. Pour in 3 cups of water and bring the mixture to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to low and let the rice absorb the water for about 35 minutes.
6. In the last 5 minutes of cooking, add the chopped apple and almonds to the dish.
